stages.name: Validate
stages.desc: Lint HTML/CSS/JS, check for broken links and malformed JSON

stages.name: Build
stages.desc: Inject build metadata, minify assets, assemble the dist artifact

stages.name: Test
stages.desc: Smoke-test rendered pages with a headless browser

stages.name: Security Scan
stages.desc: Scan for committed secrets and known-vulnerable dependencies

stages.name: Deploy
stages.desc: Publish the dist artifact to GitHub Pages

stages.name: Verify
stages.desc: Hit the live URL, confirm 200 status and version match
